summary: Added a Today projection guard so linked Train carried-focus rows only surface when the linked training session is still planned and actionable today; skipped, completed, modified, missing, and prior-day linked sessions are suppressed instead of appearing as carried-forward Train work.
risks: Unlinked Train focus carry-forward rows still surface as Today Focus carry-forward because there is no source ID to validate against Train.
recommended_next_reason: No adjacent pre-classified slice remains; stop for review after linked Train carry-forward guard.
